sponsors.reason: Leader in AI technology and frequent sponsor of AI conferences

sponsors.reason: Major player in AI and machine learning, with a strong presence in India

sponsors.reason: Long history of innovation in AI and a significant presence in the Indian market

sponsors.name: Tata Consultancy Services
sponsors.reason: Large Indian IT company with a strong focus on AI and digital transformation

sponsors.name: Accenture
sponsors.reason: Global consulting firm with a significant presence in India and a strong focus on AI and emerging technologies

speakers.name: Andrew Ng
speakers.suggested_topic: Large Language Models for Natural Language Processing
speakers.why: Founder of AI Fund and former chief scientist at Baidu

speakers.suggested_topic: Visual Intelligence and Large Language Models
speakers.why: Director of the Stanford Artificial Intelligence Lab

speakers.suggested_topic: Deep Learning and Large Language Models
speakers.why: Turing Award winner and founder of Mila

speakers.name: Demis Hassabis
speakers.suggested_topic: Large Language Models for Decision Making

speakers.name: Geoffrey Hinton
speakers.suggested_topic: Large Language Models and Neural Networks
speakers.why: Turing Award winner and pioneer in deep learning

pricing.reasoning: Based on past event data, AI conferences in India have shown a trend of increasing demand and popularity, which suggests higher ticket prices. Considering the target audience of 500 people, the prices are set to balance revenue goals with attendee affordability.

venues.name: NCUI Auditorium & Convention Centre
venues.why: perfect capacity and professional event hosting

venues.name: Chennai Trade Centre
venues.why: expansive spaces for large-scale corporate events

venues.name: Hyderabad International Convention Centre
venues.why: easily reachable and has necessary features for a conference

gtm.promotion_message: Join the ultimate AI summit in India! 🚀

final_plan.summary: AI conference in India with top speakers and sponsors, 500 attendees expected, ticket prices set to balance revenue and affordability. The conference will feature keynotes from renowned AI experts and provide a platform for networking and knowledge sharing. It will be held at a professional event hosting venue in New Delhi.
final_plan.recommended_venue: NCUI Auditorium & Convention Centre, New Delhi
final_plan.gtm_tip: Leverage Discord communities like AI Enthusiasts and Machine Learning India, and LinkedIn groups such as Artificial Intelligence Group and Machine Learning Professionals to promote the conference
